home.blurb: Computer Engineering student with hands-on experience in backend development, system design, and full-stack applications. Focused on building scalable and clean architecture systems.

projects.name: DepremKit
projects.description: AI-powered mobile app to help users organize emergency preparedness kits for earthquakes and disasters.

projects.name: CDC Data Pipeline System
projects.description: Implemented a Change Data Capture system with automated synchronization between SQL and NoSQL databases with low latency and reporting capabilities.

projects.name: Hotel Management System
projects.description: Team-based project implementing a hotel management system using MVC architecture with full CRUD operations and MongoDB integration.

projects.name: Unmanned Ground Vehicle
projects.description: Worked on embedded system integrating hardware and software for movement control and obstacle detection.

projects.name: RepoFlow
projects.description: Hybrid Project Management and Version Control System built with Clean Architecture, featuring secure authentication and modular backend design.

responsibilities: Built a hybrid project management and version control system (RepoFlow) from scratch
Implemented authentication using Keycloak (OAuth2/OIDC) with JWT tokens
Designed automatic user synchronization from identity provider
Applied Repository Pattern and Dependency Injection for clean architecture
